## Objectives
- the problems you're trying to solve
- *why* this project needs to happen
- should be fairly high-level; abstractness is fine


## Key Results
- criteria for success
- critical features
- should be measurable and concrete


## Implementation Plan
describe how this project should be implemented  
this section can be adapted and built upon as you go
